query: SELECT p.name, pv.colorName, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity, pv.supplierProductCode, pv.ean13, pv.lastStockSync FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name, pv.colorName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT p.name, pv.colorName, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity, pv.supplierProductCode, pv.ean13, pv.lastStockSync FROM products p JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId WHERE pv.stockQuantity > 0 OR pv.inTransitQuantity > 0 ORDER BY p.name, pv.colorName;
